reference: It can be an allergic reaction or Gastroesophageal Reflux Disease. Apply Kenacort mouth gel over the affected lips and tongue. Add Antavid syrup, two teaspoons, three times a day.
text: It can be an allergic reaction or gastroesophageal reflux disease. Apply Tenacort mouth gel over the affected lips and tongue. Add antacid syrup, two teaspoons, three times a day.
